title: Quality Time - Industries
description: Industrialize the world tekkit style! Focused on tech, magic and enhanced visuals, fully backported and with a reimagined world!  convenient QoL and a classic experience <3
body:
![Modloader](https://img.shields.io/badge/Modloader-Forge-red?logo=minecraft&logoColor=white) ![Title](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/d40a93b93fadbd42a2e366260523ab057fab3b58.png) # Quality Time Series: Industries A Tekkit(2) inspired modpack that keeps the classic feel and expands on magic, tech, visuals and QoL. Also backports features from later Minecraft versions. ## Notes The modpack is on pre-release until 1.0, please leave feedback <3 - Running on Java 25 thanks to CleanroomMC! - See installation note on the bottom ### Collaborators Wanted I'm looking for volunteers to help make the quests. Nothing big, smaller scope. contribute whenever and however you can, any help is appreciated <3 ## What to expect - Familiar experience to classic modpacks like Tekkit but modernized and expanded! - Backported features from later Minecraft versions. - Addition of magic mods and compatibility with tech progression - Overhauled world generation and dimensions. - Visual and audio enhancements following the Quality Time Series vision. # Overview Take a look at some of the core mods included in Industries! note: There are many more mods included, and most listed also have addons.
⚙️ Optimization and Performance | Mod | Description | | --- | --- | | Cleanroom | Java 25 | | Alfheim | Light Engine Rewrite | | Dynamic Lights | | | Nothirium + Naughthirium | | | CensoredASM | | | StellarCore | | | VintageFix| | | Entity Culling | | | Particle Culling | |
🏭 Tech and Magic 🪄 | Mod | Description | | --- | --- | | Buildcraft | | | Industrial Craft Classic + Addons | | | NuclearCraft Overhauled | | | Environmental Tech | | | Applied Energistics 2 | | | Industrial Foregoing | | | Ender IO | | | Forestry | | | Project RED | | | Tinkers Construct | | | Actually Additions | | | Cable Flux | | | Energy Converters | | | Flux Networks | | | RailCraft | | | Energy Control | | | Redstone Flux | | | Refined Storage | Storage tech | | Zetta Industries | | | ProjectE | | | Mystical Agriculture + Additions | | | Draconic Evolution | | | Forbidden and Arcanus | | | Thaumcraft | | | Electroblob's Wizardry | |
🌍 Generation and Dimensions | Mod | Description | | --- | --- | | Traverse Reforged | | | OTG + Biome's O' Plenty Bundle | Overhaul | | Basic Nether Ores, End Ores | Overworld ore generation enabled in Nether and End | | Better End | Overhaul | | Better Nether, NetherEX and NetherBackport | Nether Overhaul | | Aroma1997s Dimensional World | Mining dimension | | Caves And Cliffs Backport | |
🎮 Gameplay Mechanics and Extras | Mod | Description | | --- | --- | | Pams Harvestcraft | Food | | Spice of Life | Upsides for eating variety | | Aqua Acrobatics | Backport | | Oceanic Expanse | Backport | | Doggy Talents | Dog abilities | | Illagers+ | Expanded Pillagers | | Extra utilities 2 | | | Future MC | Backport | | Iron Backpacks, Chests and Tanks | Storage | | Storage Drawers | Storage | | Baubles | | | Quark | |
✨ Visuals | Mod | Description | | --- | --- | | Shaders + Euphoria Patches | | | Dynamic Lights | | | Dynamic Surroundings | | | Serene Seasons | Visual only, no mechanics | | Enhanced Visuals | | | Ambient Enviroment | | | Mo' Bends | More animations | | Better Foliage | | | Chiesel & Bits | Decorative Stuff | | Connected Textures | |

Real Magic! | |
--- ## Installation **Recommended memory allocation is 8-10GB.** When you first launch the modpack, you'll be prompted to download mods that aren't available directly on Modrinth. This is done to properly respect author's rights and platform guidelines. Click on "next" to proceed with the automatic download and setup. ![Example](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/03381338ecfdc64ee7b5aa66dc275de6a4991754.png) ## Credits If you are a mod author and would like specific credits or links included, please reach out. - [CleanroomMC](https://cleanroommc.com/) - [Forbidden and Arcanus by cesarzorak](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/forbidden-arcanus) - [Mob Grinding Utils by vadis365](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mob-grinding-utils) - [End Ores by rowan662](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/end-ores) - [Jade by Snownee](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/jade) - [JustEnoughResources by way2muchnoise](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/just-enough-resources-jer) - [mowziesmobs by bobmowzie](https://www.curseforge.com/minecraft/mc-mods/mowzies-mobs) ## Disclaimer I am not the author of any of the mods, resourcepacks or shaders included in this pack, nor do I claim any ownership or rights over them.
